projectDescription: An uncensored AI chat platform with built-in anonymity infrastructure, specialized agent modes, and integrated OSINT and vulnerability scanning tools.
keyFeatures: Uncensored AI chat powered by Dolphin 3.0 Abliterated 8B model
Specialized agent modes: Pentester, OSINT, Exploit Dev, Social Engineering, Code Review
Zero-log policy with all data processed in RAM
Multi-layer anonymity: Tor routing, VPN tunnels, proxy chains
Integrated vulnerability scanner and OSINT lookup panel
Voice input via Web Speech API
Auto-clear chat history on a configurable timer
Persistent multi-chat history stored locally in browser
Servers in privacy-friendly jurisdictions (Amsterdam, Singapore, Panama)
publicApiSurface: POST /api/generate — send a chat message to the Ollama model
POST /api/register — auto-register a new user account
POST /api/login — log in with existing user ID
